revision.comment: Auto-generated page using script written by Immanuelle, either as a placeholder redirect or to make bots recognize the page as made by Immanuelle
revision.text: [[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: : importing my programmatically created redirects, categories, and placeholders
revision.text: [[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude>
[[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] [[Category:bump 1-25]] </noinclude>
[[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Category:Pages with blank templates" to "Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}"
revision.text: [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Navigationsleiste Ägyptischer Kalender]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude>
[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Navigationsleiste Ägyptischer Kalender]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:de>Sinuhe20|de>Sinuhe20]]

Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]] on (CatAlot)

Immanuelle moved page [[Template:Navigationsleiste Ägyptischer Kalender]] to [[Template:Egyptian Calendar Navbar]]: Text replacement - "Navigationsleiste Ägyptischer Kalender" to "Egyptian Calendar Navbar"
Text replacement - "Valley Festival" to "Beautiful Festival of the Valley"
Text replacement - "Nile Flood" to "Flooding of the Nile"
Text replacement - "Kanopus Decree" to "Decree of Canopus"
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.

Text replacement - "|Totenfest des Osiris|" to "|Totenfest des Osiris|1=Wag Festival|2=de|3=Totenfest des Osiris|4=fr|5=Fête Ouag|6=ja|7=オシリスの死者祭|8=zh|9=奥西里斯死亡节|lt=Wag Festival (Festival of the Death of Osiris)|"
Text replacement - "Totenfest des Osiris|" to "Totenfest des Osiris|1=Festival of Osiris|"
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: replace {{ill}} with enwiki link via Wikidata
Text replacement - "Day of the Sand Holes" to "Sand-gathering Day"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q13412311)
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23392883474|time triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Egyptian_Calendar_Navbar here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Egyptian_Calendar_Navbar for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Navbox
| name  = Egyptian Calendar Navbar
| title =  [[:en:Egyptian calendar|Egyptian Calendar]]
| listclass = hlist
| image = [[File:Goddess Nut 1.JPG|150px|link=|alt=]]
 |group1 = Main Deities
 |list1 =
* {{ill|Amenophis Festivals|de|Amenophis-Feste|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amenophis Festivals|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amenophis Festivals|qq=}}
* {{ill|Amun-Re Festival|de|Amun-Re-Fest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amun-Re Festival|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amun-Re Festival|qq=}}
* {{ill|Procession of Osiris|de|Auszug des Osiris|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Procession of Osiris|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Procession of Osiris|qq=}}
* {{ill|Bastet Festival|de|Bastet-Fest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bastet Festival|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bastet Festival|qq=}}
* {{ill|Ebers calendar|de|Ebers-Kalender|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebers calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebers calendar|qq=}}
* {{ill|Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)|qq=}}
* {{ill|Raising of the Heavens (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heavens (Amun)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heavens (Amun)|qq=}}
* {{ill|Journey on Land|de|Fahrt auf dem Land|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Journey on Land|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Journey on Land|qq=}}
* {{ill|Celebration in the House of Eternity|de|Feier im Haus der Ewigkeit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Celebration in the House of Eternity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Celebration in the House of Eternity|qq=}}
* {{ill|Festival of the Dismembered Earth|de|Fest der aufgehackten Erde|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival of the Dismembered Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival of the Dismembered Earth|qq=}}
* {{ill|King's Festival Calendar|de|Festkalender des Königs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/King's Festival Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/King's Festival Calendar|qq=}}
* {{ill|Hathor Festival|de|Hathor-Fest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hathor Festival|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hathor Festival|qq=}}
* {{ill|Horus Procession|de|Horusgeleit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horus Procession|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horus Procession|qq=}}
* {{ill|Ipip Festival|de|Ipip-Fest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ipip Festival|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ipip Festival|qq=}}
* [[:en:Decree of Canopus|Decree of Canopus]]
* {{ill|Coronation (Pharaoh)|de|Krönung (Pharao)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Coronation (Pharaoh)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Coronation (Pharaoh)|qq=}}
* {{ill|Menchet Festival|de|Menchet-Fest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Menchet Festival|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Menchet Festival|qq=}}
* [[:en:Min festival|Min festival]]
* {{ill|Nehebkau Festival|de|Nehebkau-Fest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nehebkau Festival|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nehebkau Festival|qq=}}
* {{ill|Neith Festival (Esna)|de|Neith-Fest (Esna)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Neith Festival (Esna)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Neith Festival (Esna)|qq=}}
* {{ill|New Year's Festival (Ancient Egypt)|de|Neujahrsfest (Altes Ägypten)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/New Year's Festival (Ancient Egypt)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/New Year's Festival (Ancient Egypt)|qq=}}
* [[:en:Flooding of the Nile|Flooding of the Nile]]
* [[:en:Opet Festival|Opet Festival]]
* {{ill|Ptah Festival|de|Ptah-Fest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ptah Festival|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ptah Festival|qq=}}
* {{ill|Renenutet Festival|de|Renenutet-Fest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renenutet Festival|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renenutet Festival|qq=}}
* [[:en:Sed festival|Sed festival]]
* {{ill|Sokar Festival|de|Sokar-Fest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sokar Festival|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sokar Festival|qq=}}
* {{ill|Sothis Festival|de|Sothis-Fest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sothis Festival|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sothis Festival|qq=}}
* [[:en:Sothic cycle|Sothic cycle]]
* {{ill|Sand-gathering Day|de|Chenep-scha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sand-gathering Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sand-gathering Day|qq=}}
* [[:en:Beautiful Festival of the Valley|Beautiful Festival of the Valley]]
* {{ill|Thoth Festival|de|Thot-Fest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Thoth Festival|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Thoth Festival|qq=}}
* {{ill|Festival of the Sun's Eye|de|Totenfest des Sonnenauges|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival of the Sun's Eye|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival of the Sun's Eye|qq=}}
* [[:en:Coronation of the pharaoh|Enthronement in Ancient Egypt]]
* {{ill|Unification Festival (Ancient Egypt)|de|Vereinigungsfest (Altes Ägypten)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unification Festival (Ancient Egypt)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unification Festival (Ancient Egypt)|qq=}}
* {{ill|Unification Festival of the Two Bulls|de|Vereinigungsfest der beiden Stiere|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unification Festival of the Two Bulls|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unification Festival of the Two Bulls|qq=}}
* {{ill|Festival of Osiris|de|Totenfest des Osiris|1=Festival of Osiris|1=Wag Festival|2=de|3=Totenfest des Osiris|1=Festival of Osiris|4=fr|5=Fête Ouag|6=ja|7=オシリスの死者祭|8=zh|9=奥西里斯死亡节|lt=Wag Festival (Festival of the Death of Osiris)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival of Osiris|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival of Osiris|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival of Osiris|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival of Osiris|qq=}}

}}<noinclude>

[[de:Template:Navigationsleiste Ägyptischer Kalender]]
{{wikidata link|Q13412311}}
[[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: consolidate 1 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Egyptian_Calendar_Navbar for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Navbox
| name  = Egyptian Calendar Navbar
| title =  [[:en:Egyptian calendar|Egyptian Calendar]]
| listclass = hlist
| image = [[File:Goddess Nut 1.JPG|150px|link=|alt=]]
 |group1 = Main Deities
 |list1 =
* {{ill|Amenophis Festivals|de|Amenophis-Feste|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amenophis Festivals|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amenophis Festivals|qq=}}
* {{ill|Amun-Re Festival|de|Amun-Re-Fest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amun-Re Festival|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amun-Re Festival|qq=}}
* {{ill|Procession of Osiris|de|Auszug des Osiris|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Procession of Osiris|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Procession of Osiris|qq=}}
* {{ill|Bastet Festival|de|Bastet-Fest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bastet Festival|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bastet Festival|qq=}}
* {{ill|Ebers calendar|de|Ebers-Kalender|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebers calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebers calendar|qq=}}
* {{ill|Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Ptah)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heavens (Ptah)|qq=}}
* {{ill|Raising of the Heavens (Amun)|de|Erheben des Himmels (Amun)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heavens (Amun)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Raising of the Heavens (Amun)|qq=}}
* {{ill|Journey on Land|de|Fahrt auf dem Land|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Journey on Land|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Journey on Land|qq=}}
* {{ill|Celebration in the House of Eternity|de|Feier im Haus der Ewigkeit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Celebration in the House of Eternity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Celebration in the House of Eternity|qq=}}
* {{ill|Festival of the Dismembered Earth|de|Fest der aufgehackten Erde|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival of the Dismembered Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival of the Dismembered Earth|qq=}}
* {{ill|King's Festival Calendar|de|Festkalender des Königs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/King's Festival Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/King's Festival Calendar|qq=}}
* {{ill|Hathor Festival|de|Hathor-Fest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hathor Festival|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hathor Festival|qq=}}
* {{ill|Horus Procession|de|Horusgeleit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horus Procession|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horus Procession|qq=}}
* {{ill|Ipip Festival|de|Ipip-Fest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ipip Festival|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ipip Festival|qq=}}
* [[:en:Decree of Canopus|Decree of Canopus]]
* {{ill|Coronation (Pharaoh)|de|Krönung (Pharao)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Coronation (Pharaoh)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Coronation (Pharaoh)|qq=}}
* {{ill|Menchet Festival|de|Menchet-Fest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Menchet Festival|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Menchet Festival|qq=}}
* [[:en:Min festival|Min festival]]
* {{ill|Nehebkau Festival|de|Nehebkau-Fest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nehebkau Festival|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nehebkau Festival|qq=}}
* {{ill|Neith Festival (Esna)|de|Neith-Fest (Esna)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Neith Festival (Esna)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Neith Festival (Esna)|qq=}}
* {{ill|New Year's Festival (Ancient Egypt)|de|Neujahrsfest (Altes Ägypten)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/New Year's Festival (Ancient Egypt)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/New Year's Festival (Ancient Egypt)|qq=}}
* [[:en:Flooding of the Nile|Flooding of the Nile]]
* [[:en:Opet Festival|Opet Festival]]
* {{ill|Ptah Festival|de|Ptah-Fest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ptah Festival|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ptah Festival|qq=}}
* {{ill|Renenutet Festival|de|Renenutet-Fest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renenutet Festival|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renenutet Festival|qq=}}
* [[:en:Sed festival|Sed festival]]
* {{ill|Sokar Festival|de|Sokar-Fest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sokar Festival|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sokar Festival|qq=}}
* {{ill|Sothis Festival|de|Sothis-Fest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sothis Festival|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sothis Festival|qq=}}
* [[:en:Sothic cycle|Sothic cycle]]
* {{ill|Sand-gathering Day|de|Chenep-scha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sand-gathering Day|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sand-gathering Day|qq=}}
* [[:en:Beautiful Festival of the Valley|Beautiful Festival of the Valley]]
* {{ill|Thoth Festival|de|Thot-Fest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Thoth Festival|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Thoth Festival|qq=}}
* {{ill|Festival of the Sun's Eye|de|Totenfest des Sonnenauges|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival of the Sun's Eye|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival of the Sun's Eye|qq=}}
* [[:en:Coronation of the pharaoh|Enthronement in Ancient Egypt]]
* {{ill|Unification Festival (Ancient Egypt)|de|Vereinigungsfest (Altes Ägypten)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unification Festival (Ancient Egypt)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unification Festival (Ancient Egypt)|qq=}}
* {{ill|Unification Festival of the Two Bulls|de|Vereinigungsfest der beiden Stiere|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unification Festival of the Two Bulls|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Unification Festival of the Two Bulls|qq=}}
* {{ill|Festival of Osiris|de|Totenfest des Osiris|1=Festival of Osiris|1=Wag Festival|2=de|3=Totenfest des Osiris|1=Festival of Osiris|4=fr|5=Fête Ouag|6=ja|7=オシリスの死者祭|8=zh|9=奥西里斯死亡节|lt=Wag Festival (Festival of the Death of Osiris)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival of Osiris|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival of Osiris|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival of Osiris|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival of Osiris|qq=}}

}}<noinclude>
